title: Organization
point: The chapter analyzes Human Resources in SAIL.

title: Time Reference
point: Manpower profile is reported as on 01.02.2026.

title: Manpower Trend
point: Manpower declined continuously over the decade.

title: Productivity Trend
point: Labour productivity increased significantly over the decade.

title: Manpower Reduction
point: Manpower reduced by approximately 40% from FY16 to FY25.

title: Productivity Growth
point: Labour productivity nearly doubled from 315 to 615.

title: Rationalisation Impact
point: Workforce rationalisation contributed to productivity gains.

title: Efficiency Gains
point: Efficiency-led optimization improved output per employee.

title: Capacity Utilization
point: Better capacity utilization improved labour productivity.

title: Labour Productivity
point: Higher labour productivity means higher output per employee.

title: FY21 Exception
point: FY21 recorded a slight productivity dip.

title: FY22 Recovery
point: Strong productivity gains resumed after FY22.

title: Workforce Structure
point: SAIL maintains a leaner workforce base.

title: Workforce Profile
point: SAIL has a production-heavy workforce structure.

title: Operational Focus
point: Workforce is concentrated in operational activities.

title: Works Area Share
point: 84% of employees are deployed in works areas.

title: Non-Works Share
point: 16% of employees are deployed in non-works areas.

title: Manufacturing Orientation
point: High works deployment reflects manufacturing orientation.

title: Administrative Overhead
point: Low non-works share indicates limited administrative overhead.

title: Ageing Workforce
point: SAIL has an experienced but ageing workforce.

title: Succession Planning
point: Age profile highlights need for succession planning.

title: Skill Renewal
point: Ageing workforce requires skill renewal initiatives.

title: Historical Comparison
point: Current productivity exceeds historical productivity levels.

title: Rationalisation Link
point: Workforce rationalisation aligns with productivity improvement.

title: Cost Competitiveness
point: Manpower cost is a key competitiveness lever.

title: Non-Core Activities
point: Contract labour is used for non-core activities.

title: Variable Activities
point: Contract labour supports variable workload management.

title: Operational Concentration
point: Workforce is concentrated in operational functions.

title: Contract Workforce Dependence
point: SAIL increasingly relies on contract labour.

title: Future Focus
point: Rejuvenation is a future HR focus area.

title: Future Focus
point: Skill upgradation is a future HR focus area.

title: Future Focus
point: Diversity enhancement is a future HR focus area.

title: Certification Achievement
point: SAIL earned Great Place to Work certification.

title: Consecutive Recognition
point: Certification was earned for the third consecutive time.

title: Industry Position
point: SAIL is India's largest public sector steelmaker.

title: Cultural Objective
point: SAIL promotes a contemporary workplace culture.

title: Agility
point: SAIL emphasizes an agile work environment.

title: Trust Index
